sections.headline: We develop sustainable energy solutions
sections.body: Virya Energy develops, finances, constructs, and operates sustainable energy assets. We accelerate the energy transition by scaling new technologies across the sustainable energy ecosystem. By delivering 'fit for purpose energy,' we ensure our renewable solutions match each client's specific needs, scale, and operational rhythms. We provide renewable energy in the right form, exactly when needed.

cards.title: Community-centered wind energy development.
cards.body: We finance, develop and operate onshore wind energy projects, centred around community interests and environmental stewardship.

cards.title: Large and medium scale solar and agrovoltaic solutions.
cards.body: Our industrial-scale solar projects and innovative agrovoltaic solutions are seamlessly integrated with local grid systems.

cards.title: Pioneering of renewable hydrogen production.
cards.body: We lead in RFNBO hydrogen development, adding an essential component to the zero-emission energy landscape.

cards.title: Enabling the transition for everyone.
cards.body: Through our DATS 24 brand, we provide a network of fueling stations, green energy contracts for homes and EV charging parks ensuring clean energy accessibility for all.

cards.title: Comprehensive energy infrastructure monitoring.
cards.body: Our infrastructure monitoring services ensure optimal performance of energy installations on land and sea.

cards.title: Tailor made, fit for purpose B2B sustainable energy solutions
cards.body: We guide our B2B clients in their energy transition, with minimum disruption, through a frictionless integration of behind-the-meter solutions.

sections.heading: Virya Energy in a few numbers
Our Fit For Purpose Brand Promise
sections.body: For Virya Energy, the energy transition must be adapted to each reality. Our 'fit for purpose' approach reflects our commitment to developing customized solutions that exactly meet everyone's needs. By simplifying access to renewable energy, we are building a path towards a sustainable future.
